movie.synopsis: Beintehaa – Ek Anokhi Dastan : In Shimla, guarded PR professional Ananya crosses paths with volatile billionaire Armaan Khanna. What begins as work turns into a dangerous attraction, where ambition, jealousy, and power push their passionate relationship toward heartbreak and self-respect.
